description:
One message in a Claude conversation export (`conversations.json`).

Source: Claude GDPR export → `chat_messages[].sender` is `"human"` or
`"assistant"`. The `text` field carries the rendered message body.

conversation_name.description: Human-readable conversation title (if set by the user).

message_ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the message as recorded in the export.

session_id.description: UUID of the conversation this message belongs to.

text.description: Rendered message text (may be empty for tool-use or attachment-only turns).

title: ClaudeAiMessagePayload
